title: Slovakian Pea Dumplings
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring fluffy dumplings and a savory pea filling.
instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
2. Add dumplings and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
3. In a separate pan, sauté peas and savory over medium heat.
4. Combine cooked dumplings and pea filling.
5. Season with Slovakian and sugar to taste.
6. Serve hot, garnished with additional peas if desired.
